claims.summary: Semantic freshness should hand over continuously through recovery and preserve high-entropy salient content without a hard midpoint snap.
claims.disposition: verify sigmoid stale windows, recovery hysteresis, entropy and salience multipliers, and boundary regressions

claims.summary: A bounded attractor pulse should expose whether it was accepted, clamped, applied, decayed, released, or blocked.
claims.disposition: verify current pulse status, applied-RMS, overlap, safety, decay, and release tests

claims.summary: Changing semantic stale windows, sensory cadence, admission, pulse strength, or pulse safety changes live Minime behavior.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No semantic retention, sensory cadence, admission, attractor-pulse, or pulse-safety change is authorized.
